title: combretum collinum subsp. collinum
intro: Combretum collinum subsp. collinum, commonly known as the Red Bush Willow, is a shrub species native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Combretum collinum subsp. collinum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat a range of health issues, from respiratory problems to skin infections.
